profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for curated external API listings.

service.name: StableSocial Facebook API
service.tagline: Facebook profile, post, comment, and search APIs for agents.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableSocial Facebook endpoints. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableSocial.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableSocial Facebook endpoints for pages, posts, comments, followers, and search workflows.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
Authenticate directly with StableSocial as required by the provider.
